mapper.insert:
insert into payment_callback_log
out_trade_no, transaction_id, callback_type, callback_status, raw_callback_data, decrypted_data, error_message, handle_count, callback_time, handle_time, create_time, update_time,
#{outTradeNo}, #{transactionId}, #{callbackType}, #{callbackStatus}, #{rawCallbackData}, #{decryptedData}, #{errorMessage}, #{handleCount}, #{callbackTime}, #{handleTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime},
mapper.select: select id, out_trade_no, transaction_id, callback_type, callback_status, raw_callback_data, decrypted_data, error_message, handle_count, callback_time, handle_time, create_time, update_time from payment_callback_log where out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} and transaction_id = #{transactionId}

select id, out_trade_no, transaction_id, callback_type, callback_status, raw_callback_data, decrypted_data, error_message, handle_count, callback_time, handle_time, create_time, update_time from payment_callback_log where out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo} order by callback_time desc limit 1
